output.level_rationale: Title "Majors Customer Success Manager" suggests L4 account ownership scope, but without full JD text, seniority is uncertain. No company size, team structure, or strategic scope stated; defaulting to typical large-account CSM level (L4) pending full JD retrieval.
output.summary: Harvey's Majors Customer Success Manager is a customer-facing account management role, which sits outside the candidate's core strategy and operations positioning. The candidate's eight-year Google background is in commercial ops, transformation, and product strategy—not customer success execution, retention, or quota ownership. Without a complete JD, scope, and strategic scope clarity cannot be assessed; recommend retrieving the full job description to determine whether the role includes meaningful strategy or transformation components before deprioritizing further.
